query: SELECT s.id as surveyId, s.status, s.installationStatus, s.customerId, c.name as customerName, c.source as customerSource, src.groupName FROM surveys s JOIN customers c ON s.customerId = c.id LEFT JOIN sources src ON c.source = src.name WHERE src.groupName = 'Gulf' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AnaPRc1Kpw1Jvjc.659756d42373 --database 6acGApiU8Bjnxuzxb5vkwU --execute SELECT s.id as surveyId, s.status, s.installationStatus, s.customerId, c.name as customerName, c.source as customerSource, src.groupName FROM surveys s JOIN customers c ON s.customerId = c.id LEFT JOIN sources src ON c.source = src.name WHERE src.groupName = 'Gulf' LIMIT 10;
